title: achras zapota var. sphaerica
intro: Achras zapota var. sphaerica, also known as the Mamey sapote, is a tropical fruit tree native to Central America and Mexico. The plant is valued for its fruit, which has medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, and is rich in vitamins A and C. The fruit is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional medicine, the Mamey sapote fruit is often prepared as a juice, syrup, or powder for consumption, or as a topical application to promote wound healing and skin health.
